resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def isBoomerang(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> bool:
        (x0, y0), (x1, y1), (x2, y2) = points
        return (x1 - x0) * (y2 - y0) != (y1 - y0) * (x2 - x0)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses the cross-product to check collinearity in constant time; fails only when the three points are collinear or any two coincide.
